hero.label: Our Company
hero.headline: Led by World-Class Scientists and Visionaries
hero.subtitle: Helinx was founded on pioneering research in synthetic biology, with a mission to transform industries through sustainable, bio-based innovation.

about.heading: About Helinx
paragraphs: We are a leading synthetic biology company dedicated to harnessing nature's own processes to develop bio-based, low-impact solutions for the world's most pressing challenges. Our work is grounded in deep scientific expertise in cell factory engineering, precision fermentation, and enzymatic enhancement.

Founded by researchers with decades of combined experience at top-tier academic institutions and industry leaders, Helinx brings together an unrivaled depth of knowledge in metabolic engineering, bioprocess development, and commercial-scale biomanufacturing. We translate breakthrough science into real-world products that make a measurable difference.

team.heading: Management Team
team.subtitle: Our leadership combines deep scientific expertise with proven commercial track records.

members.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
members.title: CEO & Co-Founder
members.bio: A world-recognized biochemist specializing in bioengineering microorganisms for high-value molecule production. Previously led multidisciplinary research programs at a leading university, successfully transitioning bio-based innovations from lab to commercialization. Awarded multiple honors for exceptional achievement in research translation and industry collaboration.

members.name: Dr. James Andersen
members.title: CSO & Co-Founder
members.bio: A highly experienced metabolic engineer and fermentation scientist with a proven track record developing innovative bio-based manufacturing methods. With expertise spanning biofuels, bioplastics, nutraceuticals, and pharmaceuticals, James has successfully guided projects from initial proof-of-concept through to commercial-scale production.

members.name: Maria Kowalski
members.title: Chief Financial Officer
members.bio: An experienced executive finance professional with deep roots in the biotech sector. Maria brings years of CFO-level experience across multiple biotech companies, complemented by senior roles in investment banking and capital markets operations.

members.name: David Moreau
members.title: Chief Business Officer
members.bio: A recognized biotech executive with over 20 years of management-level industry experience spanning sales, marketing, general management, and strategic partnerships. David has a proven record of driving multiple revenue generation initiatives from concept to execution.

board.heading: Board of Directors
board.subtitle: Experienced leaders from across the biotech and investment landscape guide our strategic direction.

members.name: Dr. Erik Lindström
members.title: Chairman of the Board
members.bio: A founding partner of a leading Nordic life science venture fund with extensive experience in early-stage company creation, having led the formation and funding of over 20 companies across Europe.

members.name: Anna Bergström
members.title: Independent Board Member
members.bio: An international legal expert with 20 years of experience in the life science industry, specializing in R&D agreements, strategic licensing transactions, and complex research collaborations.

members.name: Lucas Martin
members.title: Investor Representative
members.bio: A seasoned venture capitalist with deep experience in cleantech and deeptech investing, having completed over 40 transactions and successfully developed early-stage businesses into thriving companies.
